description_long: This dramatic bronze sculpture depicts a dynamic scene with multiple human figures entangled in a moment of intense struggle. The central figure, a muscular bearded man, raises one arm high while gripping another figure, possibly a youth, with his other hand. Two additional figures, one on each side, appear to be caught in the turmoil, their bodies twisted and reaching outward. The composition is highly expressive, with detailed musculature, flowing drapery, and a sense of movement throughout. The figures are mounted on a rectangular base, which grounds the energetic forms above. The dark, metallic surface gives the sculpture a powerful and somber presence.
description: A dramatic bronze sculpture featuring several intertwined human figures in a moment of struggle, with a muscular central figure and expressive, dynamic poses.
description_view_0: The front view shows the central bearded male figure raising his arm, surrounded by three other figures in various poses of struggle and distress.
description_view_1: The left side view emphasizes the depth and layering of the figures, highlighting the muscular back and outstretched limbs of the central figure.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the backs of the figures, with the central figure's musculature and the arrangement of the group more apparent.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the flowing drapery and the twisting forms of the figures, with the raised arm and dramatic gestures visible.
attribute_subject_matter: mythological or heroic human figures in dramatic struggle
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
